title: YOZ-249 Vivid back industry! A rustic hot spring town, a local wife's health infiltration voyeur - Sayo Akagi
overview: For some reason, the hot spring area in a certain region seems to be very popular with men. When I asked a man who has been there several times, it seems that everyone comes here not for the hot springs, but for their health. So we secretly infiltrated the rumored health and tried to voyeur. A blissful experience in a sulfur-smelling hot spring town. The whole story is here! [* There is some disturbance in the image and sound]
